title: Imposter Rendering & Billboard LOD
description: Covers pre-rendered imposters (multi-angle rendered billboards stored in an atlas) and octahedral imposters (a continuous atlas representation covering all view directions with minimal atlas size) as the lowest-LOD representation for distant objects where even low-poly meshes exceed the geometry budget. Imposters are standard in vegetation rendering for distances beyond 500m where per-tree mesh rendering becomes untenable. Students will implement octahedral imposters for a tree asset, integrate them as the final LOD level in the LOD chain, and measure the geometry-to-imposter transition quality versus distance.
